Klasse DatabaseManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DatabaseManager
public class DatabaseManager extends Object
Simple DatabaseManager for SQLite.

Note: executeQuery returns a ResultSet and keeps the creating Statement tracked. Callers must call closeQuery(ResultSet) when finished to close both ResultSet and Statement. TODO: Performance optimizations if needed.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • DatabaseManager

      public DatabaseManager(String path, String fileName)
      Open (or create) the SQLite database at path/fileName.
      Parameter:
      path - directory path (maybe null or empty)
      fileName - database file name

  • Methodendetails

    • executeQuery

      public ResultSet executeQuery(String sql)
      Execute a query and return the ResultSet. Caller must call closeQuery(rs).
      Parameter:
      sql - SQL select/query
      Gibt zurück:
      ResultSet or null on error

    • closeQuery

      public void closeQuery(ResultSet rs)
      Close the given ResultSet and its creating Statement (if tracked).
      Parameter:
      rs - ResultSet to close (may be null)

    • closeAllOpenQueries

      public void closeAllOpenQueries()
      Close all currently tracked open queries (ResultSets and their Statements).

    • executeUpdate

      public boolean executeUpdate(String sql)
      Execute update/DDL statement.
      Parameter:
      sql - SQL update/DDL
      Gibt zurück:
      true if succeeded

    • executeUpdateWithCount

      public int executeUpdateWithCount(String sql)

    • executePreparedUpdate

      public boolean executePreparedUpdate(String sql, Object[] values)

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection()
      Expose raw Connection if needed.
      Gibt zurück:
      JDBC Connection

    • close

      public void close()
      Close manager: close tracked queries and connection.

    • executePreparedQuery

      public ResultSet executePreparedQuery(String sql, Object[] objects)

    • clearDatabase

      public boolean clearDatabase()
      Clear all data from the database. WARNING: This is a destructive operation that removes ALL data from ALL tables. This operation uses transactions to ensure atomicity (all or nothing).
      Gibt zurück:
      true if all tables were successfully cleared, false otherwise

    • clearTable

      public boolean clearTable(String tableName)
      Clear a specific table from the database.
      Parameter:
      tableName - The name of the table to clear
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the table was successfully cleared, false otherwise
